title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Graniteville, Staten Island | $900 - $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Graniteville, Staten Island. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Graniteville homeowners facing bat infestations need professional removal services that prioritize both safety and humane practices. Our bat removal and exclusion specialists serve the Graniteville community with comprehensive solutions that protect your property while ensuring bats are removed according to New York wildlife regulations. From historic homes near William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge to residential properties along Forest Avenue, we provide thorough inspection, removal, and exclusion services.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Staten Island communities like Graniteville with specialized bat removal expertise. Our licensed technicians use proven exclusion methods, provide detailed attic inspections, and offer warranties on our work to ensure your home remains bat-free for years to come.
localContext: Graniteville's mix of older residential homes and proximity to wooded areas near the Greenbelt creates ideal conditions for bat colonies seeking attic spaces and wall voids. The neighborhood's tree-lined streets and mature housing stock around the Historic Richmond Town area particularly attract bat populations looking for roosting sites.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Graniteville?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Graniteville typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes, but it must be done humanely and according to New York State regulations. Bats cannot be excluded during maternity season (roughly May through August) when flightless young are present. Our licensed technicians follow all state and local wildlife laws to ensure compliant, humane removal.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Graniteville home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching noises at dusk or dawn, droppings (guano) in attics or near entry points, brown staining around small openings in soffits or siding, and seeing bats emerge from your home at sunset. If you notice any of these signs, contact us for a professional inspection.

faqs.question: What does the bat exclusion process involve?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive process includes a thorough inspection to locate all entry points, installation of one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave but not return, sealing all secondary entry points, cleanup of guano if needed, and a follow-up inspection to ensure complete exclusion. We also provide recommendations for attic restoration if necessary.
